 --------------000903080101000902050002
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8; format=flowed
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
 
 On 03/06/2009 23:10, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
 > Thank you very much for your problem report.
 > It has the internal identification `ports/135235'.
 
 I've attached a diff from drupal6-2.4 to drupal6-2.6, which fixes the a XSS 
 vulnerability and an authorization by-pass security vulnerability.
 
 more information on:
 
 http://drupal.org/node/488082
 
 Nick
